visa_types.processing_time:
Decisions about Schengen visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.
Application processing time counts from the time an admissible application is submitted at a diplomatic mission or a Visa Application Centre. 'Admissible' means that the mission has decided that the Schengen conditions for submitting an application have been met.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling to visit relatives and friends. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling to visit relatives and friends. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[isl > idn > en > Table:Visit Relatives and Friends > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note: 
- The applicable fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change
- All fees are non-refundable.
- There is a VFS service fee of Euro 80 levied per applicant ( VAT not applicable ).

## Documents Required
Please click on the links below for detailed information on:
Iceland Application Form - English (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/KvgIpkLlKUxbmn4iVbC4R/abffb51b077b6986e5a837701a9b5887/Checklist_-_Indonesia.pdf)

## Photo Specifications

## 

[isl > idn > en > Table:Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[isl > idn > en > Table:Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[isl > idn > en > Table:Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[isl > idn > en > Table:Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Decisions about Schengen visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.
Application processing time counts from the time an admissible application is submitted at a diplomatic mission or a Visa Application Centre. 'Admissible' means that the mission has decided that the Schengen conditions for submitting an application have been met.

## Download Forms
Iceland Visa Application Form - English (Form to be filled by Latin Letters in English)
Iceland Visa Application Form - Iceland
For UTL Form please click on https://visa.government.is/ (https://visa.government.is/).
Kindly download the visa application form for Iceland. Fill in the details and submit it at the Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.forms:
Iceland Visa Application Form - English (Form to be filled by Latin Letters in English)
Iceland Visa Application Form - Iceland
For UTL Form please click on https://visa.government.is/ (https://visa.government.is/).
Kindly download the visa application form for Iceland. Fill in the details and submit it at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes.
A visa normally grants you the right to stay in the entire Schengen region.
A visa allows you to stay a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period in Iceland and is normally valid for the entire Schengen region.
Decisions about visa applications must normally be made within 15 days (from the day Embassy receives it, excluding submission time at VFS). In some cases applications will require further enquiry or documentation. So processing time in these cases might prolong. Applicants might also be asked to appear for an interview at the Embassy.
A visa does not allow you to work in Iceland unless the Immigration Service has explicitly granted you this right.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes.
A visa normally grants you the right to stay in the entire Schengen region.
A visa allows you to stay a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period in Iceland and is normally valid for the entire Schengen region.
Decisions about visa applications must normally be made within 15 days (from the day Embassy receives it, excluding submission time at VFS). In some cases applications will require further enquiry or documentation. So processing time in these cases might prolong. Applicants might also be asked to appear for an interview at the Embassy.
A visa does not allow you to work in Iceland unless the Immigration Service has explicitly granted you this right.

## Visa Fees

Please Note:

- All fees are non-refundable.
- There is a VFS service fee of Euro 80 levied per applicant ( VAT not applicable ).

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism.
A visa normally grants you the right to stay in the entire Schengen region.
A visa allows you to stay a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period in Iceland and is normally valid for the entire Schengen region.
Decisions about visa applications must normally be made within 15 working days from the day Embassy receives it, excluding submission time at VFS). In some cases applications will require further enquiry or documentation. So processing time in these cases might prolong. Applicants might also be asked to appear for an Interview at the Embassy.
A visa does not allow you to work in Iceland unless the Immigration Service has explicitly granted you this right.

visa_types.name: Long Term ( D Visa )
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants who wish to apply for Resident Permits or D Visa for Iceland mission will apply for their application with the Directorate of immigration department (contact Email: utl@utl.is (mailto:utl@utl.is) ). Once the application is accepted by the Directorate of immigration department, the Directorate of Immigration will request the applicant to visit the nearest visa application centre to submit their application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants who wish to apply for Resident Permits or D Visa for Iceland mission will apply for their application with the Directorate of immigration department (contact Email: utl@utl.is (mailto:utl@utl.is) ). Once the application is accepted by the Directorate of immigration department, the Directorate of Immigration will request the applicant to visit the nearest visa application centre to submit their application.
